Career History

Professional Experience

A career that started in data engineering at the City of Ottawa, progressed into ML-driven forecasting at the CRA, and spans data operations, reporting, and administrative work across multiple industries.

🏛
⭐ Key BI Role — 6 Power BI Reports Built · 100+ Cognos Reports Migrated
Co-Op Data Engineer
May 2024 – Aug 2024
City of Ottawa
  • Developed 6+ Power BI reports from the ground up, tailored to the needs of individual city departments and their respective stakeholders.
  • Configured row-level security (RLS) across Power BI workspaces, ensuring sensitive data was accessible only to the right teams.
  • Led the migration of 100+ IBM Cognos reports to Power BI — mapping hundreds of fields and filters, validating SQL logic, and reconciling outputs on both platforms.
  • Performed analysis in IBM Watson X Studio across 12 projects, surfacing key metrics that weren't visible in existing reporting.
  • Built initial data pipelines in Microsoft Fabric to reduce manual transformation steps and streamline data workflows.

Power BI & Data Projects

Featured Projects

Real dashboards built from scratch — multi-page Power BI reports, star-schema data modeling, DAX measures, and Python predictive modeling.

Power BIPython / ML Global AnalyticsOurWorldInData
Global Energy Consumption — Navigating the Path to Sustainability
Energy Analytics · Predictive Modeling · Policy Intelligence

A multi-page Power BI report combined with Python-based machine learning to analyze global energy trends from 1900–2022. Built to support sustainability research and energy policy decisions, the project covers total consumption by country, fossil fuel trends, renewable transitions, dependency shifts, and 2030 target tracking. Linear Regression and Random Forest models were used in Python to forecast future energy consumption, evaluated with RMSE and R² metrics.

1900–2022
Dataset Range
337K TWh
Africa 2022
8 Pages
Dashboard Views

ML Models

Power BIData Modeling E-CommerceDAX
E-Shop Order Management — E-Commerce BI Solution
Retail Analytics · Star Schema Design · Revenue Intelligence

A complete Power BI business intelligence solution built for an e-commerce company, centered on a production-grade relational data model with 15+ tables. Separate transactional fact tables were designed for orders, returns, exchanges, and payments — following star-schema best practices with surrogate keys and consistent naming conventions. The Sales dashboard tracks $13.66M in revenue, product performance, geographic distribution, and seasonal trends across 2016–2018.

PythonMachine Learning Healthcare AnalyticsEDA
Diabetes Risk Analysis — Pima Tribe Dataset
Healthcare Analytics · Exploratory Data Analysis · Predictive Modeling

A Python-based analytics and machine learning project analyzing diabetes patterns within the Pima Indian tribe. Combining exploratory data analysis with classification model training, the project identifies the key health indicators that predict diabetes onset. Findings were delivered in a structured Jupyter Notebook report with business-style visualizations and recommendations suitable for non-technical stakeholders.

768
Patient Records
8
Health Features
3
ML Models
EDA + ML
Approach
What was built
EDA on 768 patient records — glucose, BMI, insulin, age, blood pressure
Data cleaning and imputation for missing/zero values in critical health fields
Feature importance analysis — glucose, BMI & age as strongest predictors
Logistic Regression, Decision Tree and Random Forest classifiers trained
Model comparison using accuracy, precision, recall and F1 score
Visualizations: correlation heatmaps, distribution plots, confusion matrices
Business-style recommendations for preventive health screening priorities
Structured Jupyter Notebook report for non-technical stakeholder review
